ResubmitDedicatedChannel.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](#idempotency).
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.etChannelId: ID of the dedicated line channel
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.name: Channel name
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.routeType: Routing protocol; currently only supports static-route (static)
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.enableIpv6: Whether IPv6 is enabled; 1 = yes, 0 = no. IPv6 is a whitelist feature.
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.baiduIpv6Address: Cloud-side IPv6 interconnect address; required when enableIpv6=1
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.customerIpv6Address: IDC-side IPv6 interconnect address; required when enableIpv6=1
ResubmitDedicatedChannel.ipv6Networks: IPv6 routing parameters; required when enableIpv6=1 and routeType is static-route
